query:
-- Fix the 6 conversations where [Template] is shown but a newer non-template message exists
-- Update wa_conversations with the true latest message (considering ALL message types)
UPDATE wa_conversations wc
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT m.waConversationId, m.content, m.messageType, m.fromMe, m.status, m.timestamp
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT waConversationId, MAX(timestamp) as max_ts
    FROM messages
    WHERE waConversationId IN (
      SELECT wc2.id FROM wa_conversations wc2
      WHERE wc2.lastMessagePreview LIKE '%Template%'
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM messages m2 
        WHERE m2.waConversationId = wc2.id 
        AND m2.messageType != 'templateMessage'
      )
    )
    GROUP BY waConversationId
  ) latest ON m.waConversationId = latest.waConversationId AND m.timestamp = latest.max_ts
) lm ON wc.id = lm.waConversationId
SET 
  wc.lastMessagePreview = COALESCE(lm.content, wc.lastMessagePreview),
  wc.lastMessageType = lm.messageType,
  wc.lastFromMe = lm.fromMe,
  wc.lastStatus = lm.status,
  wc.lastMessageAt = lm.timestamp;

-- Verify: how many [Template] conversations remain?
SELECT COUNT(*) as remaining_template_convs FROM wa_conversations WHERE lastMessagePreview LIKE '%Template%';

-- Check if the 6 were fixed
SELECT wc.id, wc.lastMessagePreview, wc.lastMessageType, wc.lastMessageAt
FROM wa_conversations wc
WHERE wc.lastMessagePreview LIKE '%Template%'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM messages m WHERE m.waConversationId = wc.id AND m.messageType != 'templateMessage'
);

UPDATE wa_conversations wc

      )
    )

SET
